segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. So have you finished the gardening book? My roommate wants to borrow it next. I have, but I'm afraid I've misplaced it. I'm sure it will turn up anyway. What did you think of it? It was really interesting. In fact, I think I may start an herb garden. That's exciting. But I feel bad about the book. I'll see if I can find a copy online. Please forget about it. I'm just glad it's inspired you to give it a try yourself.
